prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次约17797→86614（2022年断档）→16466→10592→25611，近年波动剧烈。2025年基准约25611名，较2024年大幅后移约15019 名，反映新高考首年报考格局调整；该校在河南省物理类招生计划：2021年545人、2022年548人、2023年400人、2024年534人、2025年625人；2026年计 划705人，较2025年扩招80人（+12.8%），扩招幅度较大，理论上使竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜约第26名（2021年 第24→2022年第27→2023年第27→2024年第26→2025年第26→2026年第26），排名稳定，属全国顶尖高校行列；2026年声誉评价为「明显负面」，主要涉及校园安全 事件（前卫校区浴池事件）及学术不端舆情，共13起负面事件，可能对考生报考心理产生一定降温效应。抖音热度排名第40位（较热），短视频曝光量尚可。历史投档异常记录： 2022年河南理科断档至532分/86614名，2023年亦有断档信号，近年波动较大；第五轮学科评估A-及以上共15个：马克思主义理论A+、考古学A+、化学A、数学A 、机械工程A、法学A、物理学A、兽医学A、哲学A-、政治学A-、工商管理A-、材料科学与工程A-、生物学A-、电子科学与技术A-、计算机科学与技术A-。学科覆盖面广，理学、工 学、法学、医学实力均衡。

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次25611、2026年扩招12.8%（缓解竞争）、河南省考生总数大幅增长约32%（加剧竞争）、声誉明显负面（降温 效应）等多重因素，扩招与声誉降温的合力略小于考生暴增带来的竞争加剧效应，预计2026年最低位次较2025年小幅前移（更难进）。预测最低位次约27378名，区间26878-27878 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 17797 → 86614 (gap in 2022) → 16466 → 10592 → 25611, with significant fluctuations in recent years. The 2025 baseline is about 25611, a substantial backward shift of about 15019 positions compared to 2024, reflecting adjustments in the first year of the new college entrance examination. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Henan Province: 545 in 2021, 548 in 2022, 400 in 2023, 534 in 2024, 625 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 705, an increase of 80 students (+12.8%) compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion that theoretically eases competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 26th in the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking (24th in 2021 → 27th in 2022 → 27th in 2023 → 26th in 2024 → 26th in 2025 → 26th in 2026), with stable rankings, belonging to the top tier of national universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is 'significantly negative', mainly involving campus safety incidents (Qianwei Campus Bathhouse Incident) and academic misconduct controversies, totaling 13 negative events, which may have a cooling effect on candidates' application psychology. Douyin popularity ranking is 40th (relatively hot), with moderate short video exposure. Historical abnormal admission records: In 2022, Henan Science experienced a gap to 532 points/86614 ranking, and in 2023 there were also gap signals, with significant fluctuations in recent years. The fifth round of discipline evaluation has 15 disciplines rated A- or above: Marxist Theory A+, Archaeology A+, Chemistry A, Mathematics A, Mechanical Engineering A, Law A, Physics A, Veterinary Medicine A, Philosophy A-, Political Science A-, Business Administration A-, Materials Science and Engineering A-, Biology A-, Electronic Science and Technology A-, Computer Science and Technology A-. The discipline coverage is broad, with balanced strength in sciences, engineering, law, and medicine.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, Artificial Intelligence, and Clinical Medicine continue to have high social heat. The total number of candidates in Henan Province in 2026 is about 1.2 million (an increase of about 32% compared to about 907,000 in 2025), significantly intensifying competition. Jilin University is located in Changchun City, Jilin Province, which is far from Henan Province, making it an inter-provincial study.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 25611, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 12.8% (easing competition), the substantial increase of about 32% in the total number of candidates in Henan Province (intensifying competition), and the significantly negative reputation (cooling effect), the combined effect of enrollment expansion and reputation cooling is slightly less than the competition intensification effect brought by the surge in candidates. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will move slightly forward (harder to enter) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 27378, with a range of 26878-27878.

When the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, one can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts) was approximately 1610 → 1331 → 2053 → 2288 → 2032, fluctuating within the 1300-2300 range overall, and stabilizing between 2000-2300 in recent 3 years; the baseline for 2025 is about 2032; the enrollment plan for this university in Henan Province for History Category: 62 in 2021, 51 in 2022, 49 in 2023, 55 in 2024, 55 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 76, an increase of 21 students (+38.2%) compared to 2025, a significant expansion, theoretically greatly alleviating competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 26th in the main ranking of Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities, with stable ranking, belonging to a top national comprehensive university; the 2026 reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative', mainly involving campus safety incidents and academic misconduct public opinion, which may have a certain cooling effect on application psychology. Douyin popularity ranking is 40th (relatively hot), with moderate exposure. Historical abnormal admission records: 2022 Henan Liberal Arts cutoff, 2023 also had cutoff signals; advantageous disciplines in History Category: Archaeology A+ (top nationally), Law A, Marxist Theory A+, Philosophy A-, Political Science A-, Sociology (not separately rated but strong). Law is one of the Five Institutes and Four Departments, with profound liberal arts heritage.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of liberal arts majors such as Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism and Communication is diverging (Law is relatively hot, Journalism and Communication is cooling); the total number of examinees in Henan Province in 2026 is about 1.2 million (an increase of about 32% from about 907,000 in 2025), significantly intensifying competition. Jilin University is located in Changchun City, Jilin Province, far from Henan Province, belonging to cross-province study.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 2032, a significant 38.2% expansion in 2026 (greatly alleviating competition), a substantial increase of about 32% in the total number of examinees in Henan Province (intensifying competition), and a clearly negative reputation (cooling effect), the expansion effect far exceeds the examinee growth effect. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will significantly shift backward compared to 2025 (easier to enter). Predicted minimum ranking is about 2447, with a range of 2098-2796.
